notes: Doesn't start. Running vanilla, it creates an empty game window and immediately shows a (Windows emulated) crash reporter. By forcing PROTON_USE_WINED3D, I get a pop-up error "Error initializing DirectX on adapter Radeon RX Vega. Error code: 0x80004001." Esync launcher option don't have effect. Using PROTON_NO_D3D11 launcher option, absolutely nothing happens (no game window, no crash message).
title: V-Rally 4
